ogTitle: Upper Yarraman vs Urraween: Climate Safety

heading: Upper Yarraman vs Urraween — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Yarraman, Queensland and Urraween, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Yarraman has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Urraween (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Yarraman or Urraween safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Yarraman has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Urraween scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Yarraman scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Urraween scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Yarraman or Urraween?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Yarraman has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
